title: Iran declares new Hormuz route 'unacceptable and dangerous,' warns against ships transiting without approval
title_zh: 伊朗宣布霍尔木兹新航线“不可接受且危险”，警告船只未经批准过境
text: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.
zh: 这一严厉警告强调了德黑兰保留对霍尔木兹海峡的控制并抵制绕过其授权的过境的决心。

title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill dozens
title_zh: 特朗普承诺美国将在委内瑞拉历史性地震造成数十人死亡后迅速做出反应
text: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.
zh: 美国迅速提供援助反映了特朗普政府与委内瑞拉临时政府之间一定程度的外交调整。

title: Micron is tech's new margin king as memory crisis pushes company past Nvidia and Meta
title_zh: 随着内存危机推动公司超越 Nvidia 和 Meta，美光科技成为新的利润王
text: Micron said in its earnings report that its gross margin jumped to 84.9% from 39% a year ago.
zh: 美光在财报中表示，其毛利率从一年前的 39% 跃升至 84.9%。

title: Oil prices erase wartime gains as supply concerns ease with Hormuz tanker traffic resuming
title_zh: 随着霍尔木兹油轮运输恢复，供应担忧缓解，油价抹去了战时涨幅
text: Oil prices fell as investors bet global crude supplies will improve, as tankers stranded in the Persian Gulf for months have begun leaving the Strait of Hormuz.
zh: 由于滞留在波斯湾数月的油轮已开始离开霍尔木兹海峡，投资者押注全球原油供应将会改善，油价下跌。

title: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
title_zh: Anthropic 最新的招聘热潮揭示了下一步将在哪里建设人工智能数据中心
text: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.
zh: 该人工智能实验室正在澳大利亚和日本招聘人工智能数据中心职位，以急于扩大海外计算能力。

title: Iran's neighbor, U.S. ally: What Pakistan gains from being a peacemaker
title_zh: 伊朗的邻国、美国盟友：巴基斯坦从成为和平缔造者中获得什么
text: Pakistan's efforts to bring an end to the conflict in the Middle East are driven by the need to avoid a spillover across its borders.
zh: 巴基斯坦为结束中东冲突所做的努力是为了避免冲突蔓延到其边界。

title: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
title_zh: 欧洲遭遇创纪录高温，法国遭遇严重停电
text: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
zh: 创纪录的高温席卷欧洲，导致法国西部约 68,000 户家庭停电。

title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
title_zh: 即使手头有人工智能工具，投资者仍然寻求人性化：汇丰银行
text: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.
zh: 汇丰银行的一项调查发现，尽管使用了人工智能工具，投资者在做出最后的投资决策时仍然会参考专业顾问的判断。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
title_zh: 特斯拉和 Waymo 在机器人出租车竞赛中展开对决——但花费最多的公司根本不生产汽车
text: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.
zh: Uber 正在悄悄开出 5 亿美元的支票来锁定机器人出租车，而 Waymo 则威胁要放弃它。

title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
title_zh: 我的房客在我的桌子上留下了热痕。直到她走了我才注意到他们。我是否要求她付费才能删除它们？
text: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”
zh: “让我发疯的是她没有提到这件事。”

title: China’s stocks have upside room as liquidity, earnings grow: JPMorgan - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 摩根大通：随着流动性和盈利增长，中国股市有上涨空间 - 南华早报
text: China’s stocks have upside room as liquidity, earnings grow: JPMorgan South China Morning Post
zh: 摩根大通《南华早报》：随着流动性和盈利增长，中国股市有上涨空间

title: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China - KraneShares
title_zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国的综合指南 - KraneShares
text: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China KraneShares
zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国金瑞股份综合指南

title: China’s private funds see assets soar by over US$400 billion amid tech boom - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 科技繁荣，中国私募基金资产飙升逾4000亿美元 - 《南华早报》
text: China’s private funds see assets soar by over US$400 billion amid tech boom South China Morning Post
zh: 《南华早报》：随着科技繁荣，中国私募基金资产飙升逾4000亿美元

title: SK Hynix surges 11% after filing for blockbuster Nasdaq listing
title_zh: SK 海力士在纳斯达克申请重磅上市后股价飙升 11%
text: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 11% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
zh: 韩国芯片巨头 SK 海力士表示正在寻求筹集 294 亿美元资金，该公司股价周四飙升 11%。

title: Inside India newsletter: Meet the humans teaching robots to perform routine tasks, as India finds a way to enter the AI race
title_zh: 印度内部时事通讯：印度找到了进入人工智能竞赛的方法，来认识一下人类教机器人执行日常任务的情况
text: Several companies have cropped up in India providing video training data made by humans that is being used to teach robots in the U.S. and China.
zh: 印度出现了几家公司，提供人类制作的视频训练数据，这些数据正在美国和中国用于教授机器人。

title: Buildings collapse as quakes rock Venezuela, 'high casualties' likely
title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震造成建筑物倒塌，可能造成“大量人员伤亡”
text: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck about 160 km (100 miles) west of Caracas, with a magnitude 7.5 tremor hitting less than a minute later, according to the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS).
zh: 据美国地质调查局 (USGS) 称，加拉加斯以西约 160 公里（100 英里）处发生了 7.2 级地震，不到一分钟后又发生了 7.5 级地震。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: Why SK Hynix’s $30 billion U.S. listing could be a double-edged sword for Micron’s stock
title_zh: 为什么 SK 海力士 300 亿美元的美国上市对美光股票来说可能是一把双刃剑
text: The South Korean memory company could give investors more opportunities beyond Micron, though it may also raise awareness of industry dynamics.
zh: 这家韩国存储器公司可以为投资者提供除美光之外的更多机会，尽管它也可能提高对行业动态的认识。

title: I had gallbladder surgery. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a financial donation. Is this ethical?
title_zh: 我做了胆囊手术。回家后，医院要求我捐款。这符合道德吗？
text: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”
zh: “这封信询问我是否有最喜欢的看护者，以及我是否愿意为他们的荣誉做出贡献。”

title: Rocket Lab, Lockheed Martin among the partners in SpaceX’s military space-laser project
title_zh: 火箭实验室、洛克希德·马丁公司是 SpaceX 军用太空激光项目的合作伙伴
text: Government documents show a lineup of defense contractors joining SpaceX to create a satellite network to track airborne threats.
zh: 政府文件显示，一系列国防承包商加入 SpaceX，创建一个卫星网络来跟踪空中威胁。

title: ‘I’m scared of making a huge financial mistake’: I gave my brother half of my $1.5 million home. Can he force me to sell?
title_zh: “我害怕犯下巨大的财务错误”：我把我价值 150 万美元的房子的一半给了我的兄弟。他能强迫我卖吗？
text: “One lawyer estimated that my brother and I would each walk away with a couple hundred thousand dollars.”
zh: “一位律师估计我和我的兄弟每人会带走几十万美元。”

title: Our economic outlook for China - Vanguard Corporate
title_zh: 我们对中国经济的展望 - Vanguard Corporate
text: Our economic outlook for China Vanguard Corporate
zh: 我们对中国先锋集团的经济展望

title: Beijing’s stock exchange values policy over liquidity - East Asia Forum
title_zh: 北京证券交易所重视流动性政策 - 东亚论坛
text: Beijing’s stock exchange values policy over liquidity East Asia Forum
zh: 北京证券交易所重视流动性政策 东亚论坛

title: Chinese Economy Stable Amid Iran War, Lower Middle East Oil Reliance - 조선일보
title_zh: 伊朗战争、中东石油依赖降低，中国经济保持稳定 - 조선일보
text: Chinese Economy Stable Amid Iran War, Lower Middle East Oil Reliance 조선일보
zh: 伊朗战争、降低中东石油依赖，中国经济保持稳定

title: 7 Best Emerging-Market ETFs to Buy for 2026 | Investing - U.S. News - Money
title_zh: 2026 年最值得购买的 7 只新兴市场 ETF |投资 - 美国新闻 - 金钱
text: 7 Best Emerging-Market ETFs to Buy for 2026 | Investing U.S. News - Money
zh: 2026 年最值得购买的 7 只新兴市场 ETF |投资美国新闻 - 金钱

title: China’s Role in the USMCA Review - Baker Institute
title_zh: 中国在 USMCA 审查中的作用 - Baker Institute
text: China’s Role in the USMCA Review Baker Institute
zh: 中国在 USMCA 审查中的作用 Baker Institute

title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
title_zh: 韩国首次公开募股（IPO）失败给股市蒙上阴影，财阀结构限制上市
text: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.
zh: 由于市场结构和治理改革发生冲突，韩国的 IPO 活动落后于地区同行。

title: U.S. crude oil briefly dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 随着油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，美国原油短暂跌破70美元
text: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
zh: 在近期原油价格下跌后，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普加大了对石油公司降低汽油价格的压力。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: A relative offered me a $25,000 home loan secured by a lien that must be repaid within a year. Is that fair?
title_zh: 一位亲戚向我提供了一笔 25,000 美元的住房贷款，该贷款有留置权，必须在一年内偿还。这公平吗？
text: “He also wants me to downsize and move.”
zh: “他还希望我缩小规模并搬家。”

title: Qualcomm’s stock is soaring as these big numbers excite Wall Street
title_zh: 这些巨大数字令华尔街兴奋不已，高通股价飙升
text: Shares of Qualcomm soared on Wednesday after the company announced new revenue targets and a partership with Meta Platforms.
zh: 高通公司宣布新的收入目标以及与 Meta Platforms 建立合作伙伴关系后，该公司股价周三飙升。

title: Cerebras’s stock sinks below IPO price in a major blow to early investors
title_zh: Cerebras 股价跌破 IPO 价格，对早期投资者造成重大打击
text: The once-high-flying AI chip maker’s stock has now dropped more than 50% from its all-time intraday high hit six weeks ago.
zh: 这家曾经风光无限的人工智能芯片制造商的股价目前已较六周前创下的历史盘中高点下跌了 50% 以上。

title: Emerging Market Equities: AI, China, and India in Focus - Goldman Sachs Asset Management
title_zh: 新兴市场股票：人工智能、中国和印度成为焦点 - 高盛资产管理
text: Emerging Market Equities: AI, China, and India in Focus Goldman Sachs Asset Management
zh: 新兴市场股票：聚焦人工智能、中国和印度 高盛资产管理

title: China works to build slow, steady stock markets, rejecting norm of boom and bust - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国致力于建立缓慢、稳定的股市，拒绝繁荣和萧条的常态 - 南华早报
text: China works to build slow, steady stock markets, rejecting norm of boom and bust South China Morning Post
zh: 中国致力于建立缓慢、稳定的股市，拒绝繁荣与萧条的常态 南华早报

title: China’s corporate earnings lag behind stock market gains, survey finds - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 调查发现中国企业盈利落后于股市涨幅 - 南华早报
text: China’s corporate earnings lag behind stock market gains, survey finds South China Morning Post
zh: 调查发现中国企业盈利落后于股市涨幅

title: Wall Street tumbles in its worst day since April after Trump threatens more tariffs on China - PBS
title_zh: 特朗普威胁对中国征收更多关税后，华尔街股市遭遇四月以来最糟糕的一天 - PBS
text: Wall Street tumbles in its worst day since April after Trump threatens more tariffs on China PBS
zh: 特朗普威胁对中国征收更多关税后，华尔街股市遭遇四月以来最糟糕的一天 PBS

title: Hong Kong stocks slide after China data shows growth running out of steam - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国数据显示经济增长失去动力，香港股市下跌 - 《南华早报》
text: Hong Kong stocks slide after China data shows growth running out of steam South China Morning Post
zh: 中国数据显示经济增长失去动力后香港股市下跌 - 南华早报

title: [Big read] When the market soars but the economy struggles: China’s stock puzzle - ThinkChina
title_zh: 【大读】当市场飙升而经济陷入困境：中国股市之谜 - ThinkChina
text: [Big read] When the market soars but the economy struggles: China’s stock puzzle ThinkChina
zh: 【大读】当市场飙升而经济陷入困境时：中国股市的迷局 ThinkChina

title: More upside for China’s stock market as its AI+ plan gets going - Capital Economics
title_zh: 随着人工智能+计划的实施，中国股市将有更多上涨空间 - 凯投宏观
text: More upside for China’s stock market as its AI+ plan gets going Capital Economics
zh: 随着AI+计划的实施，中国股市将迎来更多上涨空间 凯投宏观

title: Wall Street giants lead China-profit surge despite market polarisation - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 尽管市场两极分化，华尔街巨头引领中国利润飙升 - 《南华早报》
text: Wall Street giants lead China-profit surge despite market polarisation South China Morning Post
zh: 尽管市场两极分化，华尔街巨头仍引领中国利润飙升 《南华早报》

title: China was ready for an oil shock and now investors are reaping the rewards - Reuters
title_zh: 中国已做好应对石油危机的准备，现在投资者正在收获回报 - 路透中文网
text: China was ready for an oil shock and now investors are reaping the rewards Reuters
zh: 中国已做好应对石油危机的准备，现在投资者正在收获回报 路透

title: White House requests $87.6 billion supplemental spending for Iran war, farm aid
title_zh: 白宫要求为伊朗战争和农业援助追加876亿美元支出
text: White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought asked House Speaker Mike Johnson for billions in extra spending for the Iran war.
zh: 白宫管理和预算办公室主任拉塞尔·沃特要求众议院议长迈克·约翰逊为伊朗战争提供数十亿美元的额外支出。

title: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles
title_zh: 伊朗行动导致美国导弹库存紧张，特朗普会见国防部长
text: The White House is pressing major defense firms to expand missile and munitions output as Iran talks and weapons stockpile concerns put new pressure on the Pentagon’s industrial base.
zh: 随着伊朗谈判和武器库存问题给五角大楼的工业基础带来新的压力，白宫正在敦促主要国防公司扩大导弹和弹药产量。

title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
title_zh: Anthropic 指责阿里巴巴“公然”和“非法”提取人工智能能力
text: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."
zh: CNBC 获得的这封信称，阿里巴巴实施了“迄今为止对 Anthropic 已知的最大规模的蒸馏攻击”。

title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
title_zh: 摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息
text: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.
zh: 这些公告是在美联储发布年度压力测试之后发布的，该测试发现所有 32 家大型银行都经受住了假设的衰退。

title: Identity theft victims face 'unconscionable' IRS delays, report says
title_zh: 报告称，身份盗窃受害者面临国税局“不合理”的延误
text: Victims currently face wait times of almost two years to resolve their cases, according to the National Taxpayer Advocate.
zh: 据国家纳税人倡导者称，受害者目前面临近两年的等待时间才能解决案件。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Broadcom unveils a custom chip for OpenAI as it challenges Nvidia’s dominance
title_zh: Broadcom 推出 OpenAI 定制芯片，挑战 Nvidia 的主导地位
text: The custom chip is designed to support the ChatGPT maker’s future AI models and products.
zh: 该定制芯片旨在支持 ChatGPT 制造商未来的人工智能模型和产品。

title: What Effect Will China's Stock Market Rally Have on the Economy? - Nomura Connects
title_zh: 中国股市上涨将对经济产生什么影响？ - 野村连接
text: What Effect Will China's Stock Market Rally Have on the Economy? Nomura Connects
zh: 中国股市上涨将对经济产生什么影响？野村连接

title: The Outlook for Chinese Stocks and Economy Hinges on the U.S. - Barron's
title_zh: 中国股市和经济前景取决于美国 - 《巴伦周刊》
text: The Outlook for Chinese Stocks and Economy Hinges on the U.S. Barron's
zh: 中国股市和经济前景取决于美国巴伦周刊

title: China’s stockmarket rally may hurt the economy - The Economist
title_zh: 《经济学人》：中国股市上涨可能会损害经济
text: China’s stockmarket rally may hurt the economy The Economist
zh: 《经济学人》：中国股市上涨可能会损害经济

title: China’s Market Revival Hinges on Gloomy Economy Turning Corner - Bloomberg.com
title_zh: 中国市场复苏取决于低迷经济的拐点 - Bloomberg.com
text: China’s Market Revival Hinges on Gloomy Economy Turning Corner Bloomberg.com
zh: 中国市场复苏取决于低迷经济的拐点 Bloomberg.com

title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years - BeInCrypto
title_zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年仍未复苏 - BeInCrypto
text: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years BeInCrypto
zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年仍未复苏 BeInCrypto

title: Global markets struggle after tech sell-off and fears over Chinese economy - The Guardian
title_zh: 科技股抛售和对中国经济的担忧导致全球市场陷入困境 - 英国《卫报》
text: Global markets struggle after tech sell-off and fears over Chinese economy The Guardian
zh: 科技股抛售和对中国经济的担忧导致全球市场陷入困境

title: China’s Stocks are Flying as Beijing Doubles Down on Tech. Why the Economy Is Still Struggling. - Barron's
title_zh: 随着北京加大科技投入，中国股市飞涨。为什么经济仍然举步维艰。 - 巴伦周刊
text: China’s Stocks are Flying as Beijing Doubles Down on Tech. Why the Economy Is Still Struggling. Barron's
zh: 随着北京加大科技投入，中国股市飞涨。为什么经济仍然举步维艰。巴伦周刊

title: Even as China’s economy suffers, stocks soar. What’s going on? - The Economist
title_zh: 尽管中国经济陷入困境，但股市却在飙升。这是怎么回事？ - 经济学人
text: Even as China’s economy suffers, stocks soar. What’s going on? The Economist
zh: 尽管中国经济陷入困境，但股市却在飙升。这是怎么回事？经济学人

title: Micron stock jumps 10% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
title_zh: 美光股价上涨 10%，内存紧缩导致价格飙升，收入翻两番
text: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.
zh: 美光科技发布季度收益报告之前，这家内存制造商的股价在过去一年中飙升了 700%。

title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
text: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
zh: 美联储的年度演习正值银行监管的关键时刻，因为与往年不同，此次演习的结果不会影响资本要求。

title: Qualcomm stock pops 15% after chipmaker almost doubles projection for 2029 non-handset revenue
title_zh: 芯片制造商将 2029 年非手机收入预测几乎翻倍后，高通股价上涨 15%
text: Qualcomm's primary business has been smartphones, which accounted for two-thirds of the company's product revenue in it's most recent quarter.
zh: 高通的主要业务是智能手机，该业务占该公司最近一个季度产品收入的三分之二。

title: Bitcoin falls back under $60,000, hitting its lowest level since October 2024
title_zh: 比特币跌破6万美元，创2024年10月以来最低水平
text: Bitcoin, now in the eighth month of its bear market, dropped to an October 2024 low amid a pullback in tech stocks.
zh: 比特币目前正处于熊市的第八个月，随着科技股的回调，比特币跌至 2024 年 10 月的低点。

title: This industrial play has been a quiet winner in 2026. Why the stock has more room to go
title_zh: 这种工业股在 2026 年悄然成为赢家。为什么该股还有更大的上涨空间
text: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

title: Could the U.S. join Germany in raising its retirement age?
title_zh: 美国能否效仿德国提高退休年龄？
text: Germany may gradually raise its retirement age to 70 by 2092 — but such a move would fix only part of Social Security’s funding gap.
zh: 德国可能会在 2092 年之前逐步将退休年龄提高到 70 岁，但此举只能解决部分社会保障资金缺口。

title: Retail investors think tech stocks are overvalued. They’re buying anyway — here’s why.
title_zh: 散户投资者认为科技股被高估。无论如何，他们都会购买——原因如下。
text: Retail investors ranked technology as the most overvalued of the 11 stock market sectors
zh: 散户投资者将科技行业列为 11 个股市板块中估值最高的板块

title: Meet the World Cup fans shelling out thousands for once-in-a-lifetime trips — and some don’t even have tickets to games
title_zh: 来认识一下花费数千美元进行千载难逢的世界杯球迷——有些人甚至没有比赛门票
text: Soccer has ‘cult-like status,’ and World Cup visitors are going to great lengths to afford their trips to the U.S.
zh: 足球具有“类似邪教的地位”，世界杯游客会不遗余力地负担前往美国的旅行费用。

title: These hidden PCE triggers could force a Fed rate hike — and shock the market
title_zh: 这些隐藏的个人消费支出触发因素可能会迫使美联储加息，并震惊市场
text: The PCE inflation report will either calm Wall Street or ignite fears of a restrictive Fed.
zh: PCE通胀报告要么会安抚华尔街，要么会引发人们对美联储采取限制性政策的担忧。

title: Trump looked set to tout new housing legislation. Instead he said it’s ‘of minor importance’ and nixed a signing ceremony.
title_zh: 特朗普似乎准备宣扬新的住房立法。相反，他表示这“无关紧要”，并取消了签字仪式。
text: President Donald Trump was expected to celebrate a new housing package with Democratic and Republican lawmakers — in particular a provision banning big investors from owning single-family homes.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统预计将与民主党和共和党议员一起庆祝新的住房计划，特别是禁止大投资者拥有单户住宅的条款。

title: A SpaceX ‘investment coma’ is driving this major space ETF toward its worst month in 6 years
title_zh: SpaceX 的“投资昏迷”正在推动这一主要太空 ETF 迎来 6 年来最糟糕的月份
text: Investors are seeing “the reality now of owning a very volatile space stock.”
zh: 投资者正在看到“现在拥有一只非常不稳定的太空股票的现实。”

title: Gold, silver and bitcoin are getting rocked, and angry investors can blame Kevin Warsh
title_zh: 黄金、白银和比特币正在动荡，愤怒的投资者可以归咎于凯文·沃什
text: Gold, silver and bitcoin are all falling to their lowest levels of the year as a strong dollar and fears of interest-rate hikes heap pressure on the “debasement trade.”
zh: 由于美元走强和对加息的担忧给“贬值贸易”带来压力，黄金、白银和比特币均跌至今年的最低水平。

title: Oil prices fall back to preconflict levels, but Trump’s comments on Iran show that supply risks remain
title_zh: 油价回落至冲突前水平，但特朗普对伊朗的言论表明供应风险依然存在
text: U.S. and global benchmark oil prices have dropped back to levels they haven’t seen since before the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran started at the end of February, but it’s not because risks associated with the conflict have suddenly disappeared.
zh: 美国和全球基准油价已回落至自二月底美以与伊朗战争爆发以来从未见过的水平，但这并不是因为与冲突相关的风险突然消失。

title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
title_zh: 我想把一切都留给我的儿子们，但我害怕他们会把它交给我的前夫。我该如何防止这种情况？
text: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”
zh: “我不希望我的钱落入我前配偶的手中。”

title: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative - South China Morning Post
title_zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 - 南华早报
text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post
zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 南华早报

title: Energy secretary says U.S. has ended Iran's ability to close Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 能源部长称美国已终止伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡的能力
text: Some 72 ships loaded with 19 million barrels of oil have passed through Hormuz in the past 24 hours, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said.
zh: 能源部长克里斯·赖特 (Chris Wright) 表示，过去 24 小时内，约有 72 艘满载 1900 万桶石油的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。

title: Traders are getting worried the chip stock bull market is cracking. How to protect yourself
title_zh: 交易员开始担心芯片股牛市正在破裂。如何保护自己
text: Options traders were buying a lot of protection on the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) on Tuesday.
zh: 周二，期权交易员买入了大量 iShares 半导体 ETF (SOXX) 的保护产品。

title: House passes affordable housing bill, sends it to Trump's desk
title_zh: 众议院通过经济适用房法案，将其送到特朗普的办公桌上
text: The House on Tuesday gave final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.
zh: 众议院周二最终通过了一项旨在降低购房者成本并控制私募股权的法案。

title: Nvidia's Huang calls black market data centers made of smuggled parts a 'dead end'
title_zh: 英伟达的黄称由走私零件制成的黑市数据中心是“死胡同”
text: Washington regulators and the Trump administration are increasingly wary of China getting ahold of advanced AI software and hardware.
zh: 华盛顿监管机构和特朗普政府对中国获得先进的人工智能软件和硬件越来越警惕。

title: Broadcom stock needs a win. The new OpenAI co-designed Jalapeno chip might do the trick
title_zh: 博通股票需要获胜。 OpenAI 联合设计的新 Jalapeno 芯片可能会成功
text: The news involving OpenAI, the creator of ChatGPT, comes as Broadcom stock fights to get back on track.
zh: 涉及 ChatGPT 的创建者 OpenAI 的消息发布之际，博通的股价正在努力重回正轨。

title: Gas prices aren’t falling fast enough for Trump. Here’s when drivers can expect more relief.
title_zh: 对于特朗普来说，天然气价格下跌的速度还不够快。此时，驾驶员可以期待更多的缓解。
text: President Trump is demanding the DOJ look into why gas prices aren’t falling faster at the pump. Here are four practical factors at play.
zh: 特朗普总统要求司法部调查汽油价格没有更快下跌的原因。以下是四个起作用的实际因素。

title: This solar stock is surging on the heels of a new Tesla deal
title_zh: 在特斯拉达成新交易后，该太阳能股正在飙升
text: Sunrun, a provider of home battery storage, is working with Tesla to meet the energy needs of AI data centers.
zh: Sunrun 是一家家庭电池存储提供商，正在与特斯拉合作，以满足人工智能数据中心的能源需求。

title: Americans are as worried as ever about layoffs and losing their jobs. Why so much angst?
title_zh: 美国人一如既往地担心裁员和失业。为何如此焦虑？
text: AI-fueled “anxiety about layoffs and job security are still skyrocketing,” Glassdoor research finds.
zh: Glassdoor 研究发现，人工智能引发的“对裁员和工作保障的焦虑仍在飙升”。

title: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon - Fortune
title_zh: 如果你对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会如此 - 《财富》
text: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon Fortune
zh: 如果您对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会感到惊讶 - 财富中文网

title: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 - 《南华早报》
text: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets South China Morning Post
zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 《南华早报》

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? - J.P. Morgan Private Bank
title_zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？ - 摩根大通私人银行
text: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? J.P. Morgan Private Bank
zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？摩根大通私人银行

title: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? - Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
title_zh: 中国的高质量投资产出在经济上是否可行？ - 卡内基国际和平基金会
text: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
zh: 中国的高质量投资产出在经济上是否可行？卡内基国际和平基金会

title: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum - Reuters
title_zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 - 路透中文网
text: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum Reuters
zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 路透

title: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? - Financial Times
title_zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？ - 金融时报
text: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? Financial Times
zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？金融时报

title: Cerebras CEO says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings
title_zh: Cerebras 首席执行官表示利润率预测被“误解”，因为盈利后股价暴跌
text: AI chipmaker Cerebras has a staggered lock-up expiration that includes some shares becoming available for trading this week.
zh: 人工智能芯片制造商 Cerebras 的禁售期是交错的，其中一些股票将于本周开始交易。

title: Toyota gains on General Motors in new U.S. sales forecast: 'GM may be looking over their shoulder'
title_zh: 丰田在新的美国销售预测中领先通用汽车：“通用汽车可能正在密切关注”
text: Toyota has notably leaned into hybrid vehicles while GM and others bet on all-electric vehicles, which saw lower-than-expected adoption from consumers.
zh: 丰田特别倾向于混合动力汽车，而通用汽车和其他公司则押注于全电动汽车，但消费者对全电动汽车的采用率低于预期。

title: Oil tankers with 35 million barrels stuck in Persian Gulf exited Strait of Hormuz since Iran deal
title_zh: 自伊朗达成协议以来，滞留在波斯湾的3500万桶油轮已离开霍尔木兹海峡
text: The jump in oil exports comes as the threat level for ships crossing Hormuz has been downgraded to "moderate."
zh: 石油出口猛增之际，穿越霍尔木兹的船只的威胁级别已降至“中等”。

title: Micron earnings are set to send the market on a wild ride — and a new ETF may add to the volatility
title_zh: 美光科技的盈利将导致市场剧烈波动，而新的 ETF 可能会加剧波动性
text: The Roundhill T-REX 2X Long DRAM Daily Target ETF (RAM) is a 2x levered version of the popular DRAM ETF.
zh: Roundhill T-REX 2X Long DRAM Daily Target ETF (RAM) 是流行 DRAM ETF 的 2 倍杠杆版本。

title: Bessent sees GDP growth booming again this year. Kalshi traders see little chance of that
title_zh: 贝森特预计今年 GDP 增长将再次蓬勃发展。卡尔什贸易商认为这种可能性很小
text: Kalshi traders are not agreeing with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's prediction that the U.S. economy will have 3% growth this year.
zh: 卡尔希交易员并不同意财政部长斯科特·贝森特关于美国经济今年将增长 3% 的预测。

title: Why energy could be a great place to invest even with oil prices retreating — 5 stocks to buy
title_zh: 为什么即使油价下跌，能源仍可能成为投资的好地方——值得购买的 5 只股票
text: It seems that buzz is building on investing in energy stocks in the wake of the Iran conflict.
zh: 伊朗冲突之后，能源股投资热潮似乎正在升温。

title: Nike names a new finance chief, but our plan for the stock isn't changing
title_zh: 耐克任命了一位新的财务主管，但我们的股票计划没有改变
text: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
zh: 投资俱乐部在每个工作日上午 10:20（东部时间）举行“晨会”。

title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
title_zh: Alphabet 取代 Verizon 加入道琼斯工业平均指数
text: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.
zh: Alphabet 将取代 Verizon 在道琼斯工业平均指数中的地位。

title: Everyone on Wall Street now believes in buying the dip. That is exactly why you should worry.
title_zh: 现在华尔街的每个人都相信逢低买入。这正是您应该担心的原因。
text: A strategy that feels like free money actually lags the stock market over the long term.
zh: 从长远来看，看似免费资金的策略实际上落后于股市。

title: Social Security says I was overpaid for 7 years. I believe it’s mistaken. Can they cut my benefits?
title_zh: 社会保障局说我多付了七年的工资。我相信这是错误的。他们可以削减我的福利吗？
text: “They say I made $43,000 in 2019, but I actually made that in 2020.”
zh: “他们说我 2019 年赚了 43,000 美元，但实际上我是 2020 年赚的。”
